heroHeading: A brand-new Western NY storage facility built on one idea.
heroSubheading: Don't lie to renters and don't raise their rate six weeks after move-in. That's the whole pitch.
whyParagraph1: We've all rented from a national-chain storage facility somewhere. We've all seen the ad that promises $79/mo for a 10×10, signed the lease, and opened the first rate-increase letter 90 days later. The "introductory" price was never the real price. That's the industry norm.
whyParagraph2: Epic Storage is what happens when you build a facility around the opposite assumption. We're a family-owned, Western New York operator who opened our flagship Clarence Center building in 2026 and followed with a second location on Niagara Street in Buffalo. We don't have a corporate rate-hike calendar. We're not trying to squeeze revenue out of long-term renters who have already put their couch inside the unit and can't easily move it.

values.title: Honest pricing.
values.body: The rates on this website are the rates you pay. Month after month. For the duration of your lease terms — written into the lease, not promised in an ad.

values.title: Honest features.
values.body: If we have it, we'll tell you. If we don't, we'll tell you that too. We don't have on-site cameras yet — we built around lighting, fencing, and gate control instead. When we install cameras, we'll update every page on this site to say so.

values.title: Modern amenities.
values.body: Every unit we rent is climate-controlled. Every tenant gets 24/7 gate access. Upper floors are elevator-served. Select units are drive-up. You don't have to haggle.

values.title: Local help.
values.body: You're calling (716) 331-2882 and a real person answers. No call center.

whereBody: Our flagship is at 8550 Roll Road in Clarence Center, NY and our second facility is at 1485 Niagara Street in Buffalo, NY. Both run off the same phone line and both offer exactly the same pricing and the same promise. Pick the one easier to drive to.
getInTouchBody: Want to meet on site? Our office is by appointment only. Call or email and we'll pick a time. For the fastest path to a unit, the Rent Now button will take you through Storable's secure rental flow in about five minutes.
